reference: I have been having a liver problem. How can I know if my liver is doing fine now? Say, if my liver is enlarged, how big of a threat is it? And how can I control it or bring it down to normal size? What dietary precautions do I need to take? Please advise.
text: I have been having a liver problem. How can I know if my liver is doing fine now? So, if my liver is enlarged, how big of a threat is it, and how can I control it or bring it down to normal size? What dietary proportions do I need to take? Please advise me.
